testcase.name: test_04_progress_lead_to_booking_completed

failure.message:
AssertionError: Lead stage is Lead Allocated, expected Booking Completed assert 'Lead Allocated' == 'Booking Completed'
- Booking Completed + Lead Allocated

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_lead_conversion.py:148: in test_04_progress_lead_to_booking_completed assert lead.get("stage") == "Booking Completed", f"Lead stage is {lead.get('stage')}, expected Booking Completed" E AssertionError: Lead stage is Lead Allocated, expected Booking Completed E assert 'Lead Allocated' == 'Booking Completed' E E - Booking Completed E + Lead Allocated

testcase.name: test_05_conversion_requires_payment_confirmation

failure.message: AssertionError: Unexpected error: {'detail': "Lead must be at 'Booking Completed' stage to convert"} assert ('payment' in "lead must be at 'booking completed' stage to convert" or 'accounts' in "lead must be at 'booking completed' stage to convert") + where "lead must be at 'booking completed' stage to convert" = <built-in method lower of str object at 0xfa14f2317b40>() + where <built-in method lower of str object at 0xfa14f2317b40> = "Lead must be at 'Booking Completed' stage to convert".lower + where "Lead must be at 'Booking Completed' stage to convert" = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfa14f23ad440>('detail', '') + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfa14f23ad440> = {'detail': "Lead must be at 'Booking Completed' stage to convert"}.get + and "lead must be at 'booking completed' stage to convert" = <built-in method lower of str object at 0xfa14f2317b40>() + where <built-in method lower of str object at 0xfa14f2317b40> = "Lead must be at 'Booking Completed' stage to convert".lower + where "Lead must be at 'Booking Completed' stage to convert" = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfa14f23ad440>('detail', '') + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfa14f23ad440> = {'detail': "Lead must be at 'Booking Completed' stage to convert"}.get

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_lead_conversion.py:162: in test_05_conversion_requires_payment_confirmation assert "payment" in data.get("detail", "").lower() or "accounts" in data.get("detail", "").lower(), \ E AssertionError: Unexpected error: {'detail': "Lead must be at 'Booking Completed' stage to convert"} E assert ('payment' in "lead must be at 'booking completed' stage to convert" or 'accounts' in "lead must be at 'booking completed' stage to convert") E + where "lead must be at 'booking completed' stage to convert" = <built-in method lower of str object at 0xfa14f2317b40>() E + where <built-in method lower of str object at 0xfa14f2317b40> = "Lead must be at 'Booking Completed' stage to convert".lower E + where "Lead must be at 'Booking Completed' stage to convert" = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfa14f23ad440>('detail', '') E + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfa14f23ad440> = {'detail': "Lead must be at 'Booking Completed' stage to convert"}.get E + and "lead must be at 'booking completed' stage to convert" = <built-in method lower of str object at 0xfa14f2317b40>() E + where <built-in method lower of str object at 0xfa14f2317b40> = "Lead must be at 'Booking Completed' stage to convert".lower E + where "Lead must be at 'Booking Completed' stage to convert" = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfa14f23ad440>('detail', '') E + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfa14f23ad440> = {'detail': "Lead must be at 'Booking Completed' stage to convert"}.get

testcase.name: test_07_convert_lead_to_project_success
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_lead_conversion.py:196: in test_07_convert_lead_to_project_success assert response.status_code == 200, f"Conversion failed: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Conversion failed: {"detail":"Lead must be at 'Booking Completed' stage to convert"} E assert 400 == 200 E + where 400 = <Response [400]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_09_verify_lead_marked_as_converted

failure.message: AssertionError: Lead not marked as converted: {'lead_id': 'lead_b063038f', 'lead_type': 'lead', 'pid': 'ARKI-PID-00062', 'customer_name': 'TEST_ConversionLead_d5c7adf4', 'customer_phone': '9999d5c7ad', 'customer_email': 'conversion_test_d5c7adf4@test.com', 'customer_address': None, 'customer_requirements': 'Full home interior - conversion test', 'source': 'Referral', 'budget': 750000.0, 'status': 'In Progress', 'stage': 'Lead Allocated', 'assigned_to': None, 'designer_id': 'user_716bf41c4564', 'is_converted': False, 'project_id': None, 'timeline': [{'id': 'tl_ad90cf', 'title': 'Lead Allocated', 'expectedDate': '2026-02-09T14:22:11.516131+00:00', 'completedDate': '2026-02-09T14:22:11.516131+00:00', 'status': 'completed', 'stage_ref': 'Lead Allocated'}, {'id': 'tl_dd3433', 'title': 'BC Call Done', 'expectedDate': '2026-02-10T14:22:11.516131+00:00', 'completedDate': None, 'status': 'pending', 'stage_ref': 'BC Call Done'}, {'id': 'tl_f4c8f0', 'title': 'First BOQ Sent', 'expectedDate': '2026-02-12T14:22:11.516131+00:00', 'completedDate': None, 'status': 'pending', 'stage_ref': 'BOQ Shared'}, {'id': 'tl_dee390', 'title': 'Site Meeting', 'expectedDate': '2026-02-14T14:22:11.516131+00:00', 'completedDate': None, 'status': 'pending', 'stage_ref': 'Site Meeting'}, {'id': 'tl_0e6a50', 'title': 'Revised BOQ Shared', 'expectedDate': '2026-02-16T14:22:11.516131+00:00', 'completedDate': None, 'status': 'pending', 'stage_ref': 'Revised BOQ Shared'}, {'id': 'tl_6e4305', 'title': 'Waiting for Booking', 'expectedDate': '2026-02-18T14:22:11.516131+00:00', 'completedDate': None, 'status': 'pending', 'stage_ref': 'Waiting for Booking'}, {'id': 'tl_a3d641', 'title': 'Booking Completed', 'expectedDate': '2026-02-20T14:22:11.516131+00:00', 'completedDate': None, 'status': 'pending', 'stage_ref': 'Booking Completed'}], 'comments': [{'id': 'comment_37428b63', 'user_id': 'system', 'user_name': 'System', 'role': 'System', 'message': 'Lead created directly by Thaha Pakayil. PID: ARKI-PID-00062. Designer has 24 hours to complete BC Call.', 'is_system': True, 'created_at': '2026-02-09T14:22:11.516131+00:00'}, {'id': 'comment_762753cd', 'user_id': 'test-user-1768140463239', 'user_name': 'Thaha Pakayil', 'role': 'Admin', 'message': 'Lead assigned to yadhu by Thaha Pakayil on 09/02/2026 at 14:22', 'is_system': True, 'created_at': '2026-02-09T14:22:11.575561+00:00'}, {'id': 'comment_2d6cdd23', 'user_id': 'test-user-1768140463239', 'user_name': 'Thaha Pakayil', 'role': 'Admin', 'message': 'Booking payment confirmed by Accounts team (Thaha Pakayil)', 'is_system': True, 'created_at': '2026-02-09T14:22:11.804507+00:00'}], 'collaborators': [], 'files': [], 'created_by': 'test-user-1768140463239', 'updated_at': '2026-02-09T14:22:11.804507+00:00', 'created_at': '2026-02-09T14:22:11.516131+00:00', 'designer_details': {'user_id': 'user_716bf41c4564', 'name': 'yadhu', 'picture': 'https://ui-avatars.com/api/?name=yadhu&background=2563eb&color=fff', 'role': 'Designer'}, 'designer_name': 'yadhu', 'booked_value': 750000.0, 'booked_value_locked': True, 'booked_value_locked_at': '2026-02-09T14:22:11.804507+00:00', 'booked_value_locked_by': 'test-user-1768140463239', 'booked_value_source': 'inquiry', 'booking_payment_confirmed': True, 'booking_payment_confirmed_at': '2026-02-09T14:22:11.804507+00:00', 'booking_payment_confirmed_by': 'test-user-1768140463239', 'booking_payment_confirmed_by_name': 'Thaha Pakayil'} assert False == True + where False = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfa14f23b5a40>('is_converted') + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfa14f23b5a40> = {'assigned_to': None, 'booked_value': 750000.0, 'booked_value_locked': True, 'booked_value_locked_at': '2026-02-09T14:22:11.804507+00:00', ...}.get

testcase.name: test_12_verify_cannot_convert_already_converted_lead
